raw_response: Given your high quality sensitivity and moderate price sensitivity, the Baseus 65W charger is a strong choice. It offers robust performance with GaN technology for compact size and efficiency, supporting both USB-C and USB-A ports. Though it lacks an included cable, its PPS support ensures reliable fast charging for compatible devices. While some users report minor issues with certain laptops, the overall value and reliability make it a worthwhile investment despite your low brand familiarity with Baseus.
